title: Epic Bosses
description: A mod for epic bosses in minecraft that adds a lot of unique content.
body:
# Developer's note:
### We found some critical bugs in Epic Bosses, but I temporarily lost access to the mod files. It will take me a few days to restore everything. Please be understanding. We have options on how to bypass them without updating. You will need to take the necessary batteries from creative, because their craft now gives out a portal battery.
#  Description
  Epic Bosses is a mod for epic, unusual, and cool bosses for minecraft. The mod has its own difficulty, which depends on the difficulty you choose, the time of day, and the weather. This way, you can make the game easier or more challenging.
  Additionally, the mod adds the Mechanis dimension, a ruined world with remnants of civilization. You may be able to craft powerful weapons and armor from what remains.

### To play with the mod, you must install GeckoLib.
